svg.aria-label: Model 1987 · turret board layout (derived) — redrawn board layout diagram
svg.text: Redrawn from Marshall model 1987 factory drawing (Unicord 70-19-11, July 1970) — layout derived from this schematic; no factory layout sheet located — not a trace
Note: the 6.3 V heater twisted pair always routes on the top layer and never joins another run — its crossings are not hop-overs.
